name: r8-contradiction-matrix
task:
R8 Iteration 2: Project-wide contradiction matrix for ANAVI.

Working dir: /home/ariel/Documents/anavi-main/anavi

R8 PRD: anavi/docs/plans/2026-03-04-prd-r8-dashboard-logic-integrity.md
Spec 000 (DONE): specs/000-dashboard-logical-integrity-and-relevance.md

Task: Scan all core page files and produce a structured contradiction register. For each contradiction, record:
- Surface (file/component)
- Type: IRRELEVANT_BLOCK | FALLACIOUS_KPI | CTA_MISMATCH | PERSONA_DRIFT | MODE_LEAK
- Severity: HIGH | MEDIUM | LOW
- Description: what the UI claims vs what the system can actually do
- Fix hint: what change would resolve it

Core surfaces to scan:
- client/src/pages/dashboard/ (originator, investor, principal)
- client/src/pages/relationships/ (index.tsx)
- client/src/pages/deal-matching/ (index.tsx)
- client/src/pages/DealRooms.tsx
- client/src/pages/Verification.tsx (if exists)
- client/src/pages/Payouts.tsx / Attribution / Portfolio
- client/src/pages/Intents.tsx (if exists)

Focus on:
1. KPIs/stats shown without real data source (hardcoded or demo-leaked into live)
2. CTAs that route to non-existent or wrong pages
3. Blocks shown regardless of runtime mode (demo vs live)
4. Persona-specific UI that shows wrong content for wrong persona
5. Trust Score / verification status claims that may overstate

Output: Write the contradiction register to specs/001-r8-contradiction-register.md with severity rankings. Do NOT make code changes — analysis only.

After writing, run: node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit to confirm no breakage from prior work.

name: r8-cta-audit
task:
R8 Iteration 4: CTA precondition/outcome audit for ANAVI dashboard-linked flows.

Working dir: /home/ariel/Documents/anavi-main/anavi

Task: Audit all CTAs in the dashboard pages and their linked destination pages for truthfulness.

For each CTA:
1. Read what the button/link says
2. Check the destination route exists in client/src/App.tsx
3. Check if the target page has a real backend mutation or tRPC query
4. Identify if the CTA is available in live mode, demo mode, or both
5. Check if clicking it would actually succeed (preconditions met) or silently fail

Files to audit:
- client/src/pages/dashboard/OriginatorDashboard.tsx
- client/src/pages/dashboard/InvestorDashboard.tsx
- client/src/pages/dashboard/PrincipalDashboard.tsx
- client/src/pages/dashboard/atoms.tsx (MaybeLink usages)
- client/src/App.tsx (route definitions)
- server/routers/*.ts (check if endpoints exist)

Fix any CTAs where:
- Route doesn't exist in App.tsx → update href to nearest valid route
- CTA shows in live mode but has no real backend action → gate behind isDemo or add meaningful placeholder
- Label doesn't match what the action actually does

Only fix HIGH severity issues. Output a brief summary of what was fixed vs deferred. Run node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit after fixes.

name: r8-mode-leak-fix
task:
R8 Iteration 6: Runtime mode integrity — fix demo data leaking into live mode across core pages.

Working dir: /home/ariel/Documents/anavi-main/anavi

Context: ANAVI has 3 runtime modes: demo (fixtures only), hybrid (demo context + real auth), live (production auth only). The demo context is at client/src/contexts/DemoContext.tsx. Pages should use: const demo = useDemoFixtures(); and gate demo-only content behind !!demo.

Task: Find and fix places where:
1. Hardcoded mock data is shown regardless of mode (e.g., hardcoded arrays of fake stats, fake relationship counts, fake deal metrics)
2. tRPC queries are NOT guarded with `enabled: !demo` — causing them to fire even in demo mode
3. Demo-only UI blocks (fake KPIs, fake timelines, placeholder cards) render in live mode

Files to check:
- client/src/pages/dashboard/OriginatorDashboard.tsx
- client/src/pages/dashboard/InvestorDashboard.tsx  
- client/src/pages/relationships/index.tsx
- client/src/pages/deal-matching/index.tsx
- client/src/pages/DealRooms.tsx
- client/src/pages/Portfolio.tsx
- client/src/pages/AttributionLedger.tsx

Pattern to enforce:
```tsx
const demo = useDemoFixtures(); // null in live mode
const { data: liveData } = trpc.x.useQuery(undefined, { enabled: !demo });
const items = demo?.items ?? liveData ?? [];
```

Fix mode leaks found. Do NOT change demo fixture logic — only ensure live path is clean. Run node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit && node_modules/.bin/vitest run after fixes.
